_meta.warning: These hooks are LLM-generated suggestions, not specifications. Triggers reference predicates that may not be computable by any current CustomOS subsystem; treat them as inspiration for future automation work, not as a contract.

suggestions.trigger: day_of_week IN {"Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri"} AND local_time >= "10:00" AND local_time <= "16:00" AND app_switch_count_between("com.apple.terminal","com.apple.safari","last_3m") >= 4
suggestions.action: Activate workspace "Dev+Docs": tile Terminal left (60%) and Safari right (40%), focus Terminal; bind hotkey F13 to toggle focus between the two.
suggestions.rationale: You repeatedly ping‑pong Terminal ↔ Safari while coding; a fixed side‑by‑side layout and a single hotkey removes most context‑switch cost.

suggestions.trigger: day_of_week == "Fri" AND (shell_command_count_last_30m > 150 OR shell_command_match_count_last_30m("railway|deploy|git push|npm run build") >= 3)
suggestions.action: Enable Focus "Release"; keep Mac awake for 120m (caffeinate); open/tile Terminal with Safari; open URLs https://github.com and https://railway.com; restrict notifications to VIP.
suggestions.rationale: Fridays are heavy Terminal/release days; preloading dashboards and silencing noise reduces deploy friction and failures.

suggestions.trigger: day_of_week IN {"Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri"} AND local_time >= "21:30" AND local_time <= "23:30" AND (frontmost_app == "net.whatsapp.whatsapp" OR safari_active_tab_domain CONTAINS "mail.google.com")
suggestions.action: Activate Focus "Evening Triage" until 23:30 (VIP/Calendar only); tile WhatsApp with Safari; dim display by 15%; set system volume to 35%.
suggestions.rationale: You habitually clear mail/web/messages 22:00–23:00; a calmer, distraction‑reduced workspace fits that routine.

suggestions.trigger: local_time >= "12:45" AND local_time <= "14:15" AND music_playing == true AND keyboard_activity_rate_last_10m < 0.3
suggestions.action: Enable Focus "Lunch" until 14:15; snooze notifications for 45m; set display brightness to 60%; set status to Away.
suggestions.rationale: There’s a consistent lunch dip with Music playing; auto‑silencing preserves the break and avoids mid‑meal pings.

suggestions.action: Show a compact "Chat Controls" panel with output/input device, volume, and DND; if bluetooth_headphones_available == true then route audio to Headphones; auto‑enable Focus "Communications" on WhatsApp call start.
suggestions.rationale: Frequent WhatsApp ⇄ Control Center hops indicate repeated audio/DND tweaks; an inline control trims the toggling.

suggestions.action: Copy current location URL to clipboard; surface a "Paste current location" nudge in WhatsApp; tile WhatsApp with Find My for quick confirm → send.
suggestions.rationale: Your WhatsApp ↔ Find My pattern suggests sharing or checking a location; auto‑copy and side‑by‑side reduce steps.

suggestions.action: Open a Quick Capture overlay (photo/doc scan) that auto‑copies the latest shot; refocus WhatsApp; show "Paste last capture" action.
suggestions.rationale: You often jump to Camera then back to WhatsApp; streamlined capture‑to‑clipboard makes sharing immediate.

suggestions.trigger: local_time >= "00:00" AND local_time <= "00:10" AND shell_command_count_last_10m >= 500 AND file_open_count_last_10m >= 300 AND user_input_events_last_10m < 10
suggestions.action: Mark session as "Automated Jobs" (exclude from engagement stats); delay non‑critical notifications until 00:15; if power_source == "Battery" then enable Low Power Mode.
suggestions.rationale: The midnight burst is automated (not interactive); avoid misclassifying it as usage and suppress unnecessary noise.

suggestions.trigger: process_cpu_percent("photoanalysisd") > 40 AND duration_over_threshold("photoanalysisd",">40%","5m") == true AND app_focused("com.apple.photos") == false
suggestions.action: Exclude Photos background from usage timelines; if power_source == "Battery" AND battery_percent < 30 then prompt to enable Low Power Mode to throttle indexing.
suggestions.rationale: High Photos background activity is indexing, not real use; filter analytics and protect battery when mobile.

suggestions.trigger: login_event_within_last_2m == true AND day_of_week IN {"Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri"} AND local_time >= "08:30" AND local_time <= "10:00"
suggestions.action: Launch "Start Work" workspace: Terminal + Claude (left column), Safari + Obsidian (right column), Finder in repo folder; open https://github.com, https://mail.google.com, https://claude.ai; enable Focus "Work".
suggestions.rationale: On weekdays you ramp from login → Safari → Terminal; preloading your coding/AI/research setup speeds the first block.
